settings.title: Connection to Amazon Account
settings.success: You are successfully connected to Amazon Alexa Services.
settings.otpHint: Requires authenticator-app 2-step verification. SMS or email codes will not work.
settings.debugLoggingHint: Turn this on only when troubleshooting. It records detailed technical logs (with secrets removed) so they appear in a diagnostic report. Reproduce the problem while it's on, send a diagnostic report, then turn it off again.
settings.errorOtpPage: Amazon didn't show the authenticator-code step. This usually means your email or password is incorrect, or that 2-step verification isn't set up with an authenticator app (SMS or email codes won't work) — occasionally it's just a temporary security check. Please double-check your Amazon email and password, make sure an authenticator app is enabled under Amazon → Login & Security → 2-step verification, then try again with a fresh code.

pair.disconnected: Not connected to Amazon. Please check your connection in the app settings.
